summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard captures a high‑energy set with Phil’s booming bass solos on “Eyes of the World”.
review: The recording is praised for its exceptional clarity – every instrument shines, from Weir’s crisp guitar to Keith’s perfect piano and a powerful, loud bass line. The show itself is highlighted for Phil Lesh’s aggressive playing and standout bass solo in “Eyes of the World”, making it a must‑listen performance.

ai_rating.rationale: A single detailed 5‑star review emphasizes both superb soundboard quality and an inspired performance, justifying a near‑perfect rating despite limited sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review notes exceptional instrument separation, crystal‑clear piano, loud bass with prominent solos, and a supportive, unobtrusive drum mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers focus on overall performance energy.

band_member_comments.Phil: Highly energetic throughout, with a standout bass solo in “Eyes of the World”.
band_member_comments.Bob: Weir’s guitar is present and described as ‘really cool’.
band_member_comments.Keys: Piano is perfect and clearly heard.
band_member_comments.Drums: The drum kit is supportive and not overly busy.
